name: Factor(UT): Untrusted Decomposer
description: AAAI 2026 workshop paper. We asked: can you safely use a powerful but untrusted AI to plan, while smaller trusted AIs do the actual work? Answer: yes — but only if you monitor the *implementation*, not just the plan. Implementation-level monitoring achieves AUROC 0.96 vs. 0.52 for plan-only.

name: DeceptionScoop
description: When an AI is about to deceive you, does it show physical signs — like a person who pauses before lying? DeceptionScoop tests this: measuring GPU power spikes, response latency, and token entropy shifts to detect deceptive AI intent before it acts. Side-channel profiler, not a brittle text classifier.

name: POP2 Protein Expression
description: POP2 is a human enzyme involved in gene regulation. Instead of years of trial-and-error bench work, we used AI-assisted parameter search to design the expression protocol. Achieved 735 μg/mL yield in yeast and E. coli — enough for downstream research. CURC Highest Honors. Led a 10-person undergrad team at CSU that operated at graduate-level throughput.

name: CryoProtect
description: Cryoprotectants keep cells alive during freezing — used in organ preservation, fertility treatments, and cosmetics. We built a computational pipeline to discover better ones: a database of 9,495 candidate molecules with similarity search, toxicity scoring, and molecular property filtering. Built for a Colorado biotech lab; dataset remains proprietary.

name: Control Technologies Ltd
description: Service engineering internship at an industrial automation firm in Trinidad. Designed P&ID diagrams for automated brewery control systems, implemented CCTV-PLC monitoring for regulatory compliance, and analyzed workflows to cut bottlenecks in production lines.

name: LAS Retail
description: Founded the first specialty retail smoke shop in Trinidad by studying U.S. 2018 Farm Bill regulations and identifying where they mapped onto local law. Ran all operations solo: supplier sourcing, compliance, inventory, customer acquisition. Achieved early traction, then executed a clean exit and relocation to pursue research.
